---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new API endpoint or changes to the protocol specifiction.
title: '[RFC]: '
labels: ['enhancement', 'status: review-needed']
assignees: ''

---

**Feature Description**
What would you like to add to the roger protocol? Try to describe your feature as precisely as possible

**Implementation Details**
If you already have an idea on how to implement your feature, tell us here!

---
- [ ] I checked that my feature request isn't a duplicate.
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/roger-protocol/roger-specs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) file.
- [ ] I certify that this contribution is my own original work, or that I have the clear legal right to submit it under the project's [Apache License 2.0](https://github.com/roger-protocol/roger-specs/blob/main/LICENSE).
